headline: Assessing Visa (V) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Long Term Returns
summary: Visa stock snapshot after recent performance Visa (V) has drawn attention after a mixed stretch in its share performance, with a slight gain over the past month alongside negative returns over the past 3 months, year to date, and the past year. See our latest analysis for Visa. With the share price at US$311.29, Visa’s recent 30 day share price return of 2.25% contrasts with a weaker 90 day move of 4.62% and a year to date decline of 10.16%, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 39.57%...
